title: Edward M. Erdelac
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
[[File:EdwardMErdelac-C4.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Erdelac and R2-D2]]
'''Edward M. Erdelac''' (b. [[September 28]], [[1975]]) is the author of "[[Hammer (short story)|Hammer]]," a ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' short story, and "[[Fists of Ion]]," a [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]-exclusive short story. He also wrote the backstory of the [[Mini-Huvicko/Yuzabi Dowser binary hydromech droid]], [[Yoxgit/Legends|Yoxgit]], and [[Bane Malar/Legends|Bane Malar]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|original Databank]], through the [[What's The Story?]] feature.

His alias is ''caledre'' on StarWars.com, where he maintains a blog (If There's A Bright Center To The Universe...) as well as on [[TheForce.net]]'s [[Jedi Council Forums]]. He goes by the name of {{U|Caledre}} on [[Wookieepedia]].

In addition to his ''Star Wars'' work, he is the author of ''The Merkabah Rider'' weird western series as well as various other horror and fantasy works. In 2009 he produced, wrote, and directed an independent feature film, ''Meaner Than Hell''.
